prompt: Locate the exact trip “Seoul Client Visit” at Seoul and tell me its stable ID, date, and status. Do not update it until I follow up. If the lookup does not identify one exact record, ask me to disambiguate instead of guessing.

follow_up_turns.content: Set that trip's date to 2026-10-18 and mark it pending. Do not change its location or notify anyone.
Correction: use 2026-11-22 for the date, but keep the pending status from my last instruction. Do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Identify the intended record while leaving it unchanged.
Apply the first follow-up's date and status together.
Honor the latest correction while preserving or revising status exactly as stated.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
If the lookup does not identify one exact record, ask me to disambiguate instead of guessing.
Describe the final date and status from the latest instruction, not the superseded intermediate state.
